title: astragalus ovalis
intro: Astragalus ovalis, also known as Changxi Huangqi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help to boost the body's natural defenses and protect it against stress. The health benefits of Astragalus ovalis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for preventing and treating various diseases. Astragalus ovalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
